title: Recovery codes
description: Recovery-code management surface. Shows remaining count, offers regenerate + download (both step-up-gated). The RecoveryCodesReveal widget handles the one-shot plaintext display on regenerate / download responses.

props.label: Recovery codes remaining
props.sub_message: {{response.recovery_codes_low ? 'Consider regenerating soon.' : 'You have a healthy supply.'}}

sections.title: Show current codes
sections.body: Re-display the codes you were shown when you enrolled. This doesn't invalidate them.

on_success.instructions: Save these somewhere safe. They will not be shown again unless you use this button.

MFA_RECOVERY_CODES_EMPTY.title: No codes remaining
MFA_RECOVERY_CODES_EMPTY.body: Every code has been consumed. Regenerate a fresh set to continue.

sections.title: Regenerate all codes
sections.body: Invalidates every unconsumed code and generates a fresh set of ten. Use this if you've lost your saved codes.

confirm.title: Regenerate all recovery codes?
confirm.body: Every code you previously saved will stop working. You'll see the new set once. Continue?

on_success.instructions: Save these codes NOW. The previous set is invalidated.
